meta_description: Speak any language, your audience hears their own. Typically under 1 second. Works with Zoom, Meet, Teams & WhatsApp Desktop.
hero_badge: Sign up free — get 5 minutes credit
hero_headline:
Speak any language.
Your audience hears theirs.
hero_sub: VoiceBridge translates your voice in real time — Zoom, Meet, Teams, or any meeting platform. No virtual audio cables. No setup headaches. Just install and talk.
how_sub: From install to live translation in under 60 seconds.
how_1_desc: Download for macOS or Windows. The virtual microphone driver installs automatically — no extra setup.
how_2_desc: In Zoom, Teams, WhatsApp Desktop, or Google Meet (browser) — select "VoiceBridge Microphone" as your input device.
how_3_desc: Talk naturally in your language. The other side hears a fluent translation in their language — instantly.
compat_sub: VoiceBridge installs a virtual microphone on your Mac or PC. Any desktop app that lets you choose a microphone can use it.
compat_works_1: Zoom, Microsoft Teams, WhatsApp Desktop (Mac & Windows)
compat_works_2: Google Meet & Teams in Chrome, Safari, or Edge — pick mic in the browser
compat_works_3: Discord, Slack, and other desktop apps with a microphone picker
compat_not_1: Mobile apps — WhatsApp, Meet, or Zoom on iPhone / Android
compat_not_2: Phone or tablet — VoiceBridge runs on Mac and Windows desktop only
compat_not_3: Apps that lock you to the built-in mic with no device picker
compat_note: Press Start Translation in VoiceBridge before your call, then select VoiceBridge Microphone in the meeting app.
feat_1_desc: English, Turkish, Spanish, French, Arabic, Japanese, Chinese, Hindi, and 92 more.
feat_2_desc: End-to-end pipeline — speech recognition, translation, and synthesis — typically under 1 second.
feat_3_desc: Works as a virtual microphone. No BlackHole, no Loopback, no audio routing nightmares.
feat_4_desc: All AI calls go through our proxy. Your sensitive keys stay on our servers, not in the app.
feat_5_desc: Native drivers for Apple Silicon, Intel Mac, and Windows 10/11. One installer handles everything.
feat_6_desc: Buy a pack once. Use them at your own pace — no monthly subscriptions, no surprise charges.
langs_sub: Every plan includes all languages — no add-ons.
pricing_teaser_sub: Pay once for a pack of minutes. No subscriptions. Minutes never expire.
cta_sub: Create a free account and get 5 minutes of translation credit instantly.
footer_tagline: Real-time voice translation for global teams.
